description: Slip your feet into heavenly comfort with this pair of slippers from vans. Crafted with durable-yet-cushioned material to offer all-day comfort, this pair of flip flops adds absolute comfort to your casual wardrobe. Upper Wide and cushioned synthetic leather straps in a thong style, with a toe separator PU footbed with raised square nubs for all-day massage feel Outsole PU outsole with hexagonal lugs for absolute grip and traction Care Wipe surface with a clean and damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
